title: mo bombs
description: a simple mod that add bombs
body:
Mo' Bombs - The Ultimate Prank Mod for Minecraft!
Mo' Bombs is a devious prank mod that adds explosive versions of common blocks, perfect for catching your friends off guard! With hidden traps disguised as everyday items, you can set up the ultimate surprise for anyone who isn’t paying attention. Watch as they unsuspectingly interact with a lever, chest, oak door, or button—only for it to explode in their face! 💥

Features:
- Explosive Lever – Flick it and BOOM! No redstone for you.
- TNT Chest – Looks like loot, but it's just a blast!
- Boom Door – Open at your own risk… or don't.
- Blasting Button – The last button they'll ever press!

Perfect for pranking friends, defending secret bases, or just causing a little mayhem! Mo' Bombs brings the chaos... use it wisely (or don’t)! 😈💣🔥
